title: Obstruction Stack PASS: canonical forbidden case r=6 (p=3, k=2) — full chain holds
_fixture_purpose: PASS fixture: the canonical forbidden residue r=6 (mod 9) under p=3, k=2. Walks through all four stack layers: (1) v_3(6)=1 → OBSTRUCTION_PRESENT [111]; (2) forbidden → claimed_reachable=false, control_verdict=UNREACHABLE [112]; (3) unreachable → pruned_before_search=true, nodes_expanded=0 [113]; (4) saved_nodes=47, pruning_ratio=1.0 vs naive 47-node search [114]. stack_conclusion.full_chain_holds=true. All four layers self-consistent and confirmed by independent recomputation.

arithmetic_layer.notes: 6 = 2·3^1; v_3(6)=1. 6 mod 3=0 (divisible) and 6 mod 9≠0 (not p^2-divisible). Exactly the forbidden class: r ∈ Im(f) iff v_p(r)≠1; since v_3(6)=1 it is absent from the norm form image.

control_layer.notes: [112] bridge: v_3(r)=1 → no control PASS cert may assert r reachable. claimed_reachable=false is the only valid cert value for this target.

planner_layer.notes: [113]: planner consults [112] bridge before any search expansion. OBSTRUCTION_PRESENT → prune immediately. Zero nodes expanded — entire search budget preserved.

efficiency_layer.notes: [114]: naive planner exhausts 47 nodes before concluding no plan exists. Obstruction-aware planner expands 0. saved_nodes=47-0=47; pruning_ratio=47/47=1.0. Savings are structural (norm form impossibility), not heuristic.

stack_conclusion.notes: The obstruction propagates deterministically: v_p(r)=1 (arithmetic) → unreachable (control) → pruned, 0 nodes (planner) → 47 nodes saved, ratio=1.0 (efficiency). Each implication is independently recomputable.

validation_checks.description: stack_conclusion.full_chain_holds consistent with all four layers
validation_checks.details: all four layers OBSTRUCTION_PRESENT-consistent; full_chain_holds=true; match
